page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. This x86_64 architecture server features 16 dedicated physical cores with 16 vCPUs, operating at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The processor includes a 35 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AVX512_VNNI. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate a clear performance profile characterized by average multi-core capabilities alongside weaker single-core execution. In single-threaded tasks, such as Geekbench single-core and stress-ng single-core tests, the instance performs in the bottom 25%, with single-threaded gzip compression dropping to the bottom 10%. Conversely, multi-threaded workloads show average performance, as demonstrated by the stress-ng multi-core score of 11798.08 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 6324.0. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks consistently fall within the middle 50% tier, matching the average performance seen in Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.sn2.3xlarge offers a balanced resource density for workloads that can leverage multi-threaded execution rather than relying on high single-core clock speeds. Given the lack of local storage and GPU acceleration, this instance is best suited for network-attached storage configurations. Appropriate workloads include general-purpose web serving, multi-threaded database operations, software compilation, and moderate-scale text or image processing. It can also handle light LLM inference tasks for smaller models, though prompt processing speeds degrade significantly on larger models.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, it provides 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and offering a 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core performance is weak, placing in the bottom 25%, whereas multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics consistently rank in the average tier. This hardware profile makes the ecs.sn2.3xlarge qualitatively cost-effective for multi-threaded workloads that do not demand high single-thread velocity. It is best suited for general-purpose applications such as static web serving, software compilation, multi-threaded database operations, and moderate image processing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, offering balanced multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and average multi-core benchmark performance.
tagline: A dedicated 16-core general-purpose virtual server delivering balanced multi-threaded performance and memory capacity for standard enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 16-core Intel Xeon 8269CY processor at 2.5 GHz
Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Features dedicated CPU allocation with AVX-512 instruction support
Delivers average multi-core performance but exhibits weaker single-core speeds
Lacks local storage and GPU hardware, utilizing network-attached storage
Best suited for web serving, software compilation, and multi-threaded databases
